name: @forgeax/app-learn-render-1-getting-started-4-textures
description: learn-render LearnOpenGL section 1.4 textures — disk JPEG + sidecar meta + GPU upload via loadByGuid (M8 milestone fills index.ts + smoke).

forgeax._smokeInvocationComment: smokeInvocation = self-contained SSOT for AC-03 (D-7): textures dawn-node smoke literal lives in this package.json#forgeax.smokeInvocation + .github/workflows/ci.yml only. M4 milestone scaffolds the script as a placeholder; M8 milestone (T-M8-04 / -05) lands the real 300-frame dawn smoke + pixel readback recipe.

bench.reason: pixel-parity bench drives parity-forgeax vs parity-threejs; learn-render entries land as bench:pixel-parity 7-entry placeholders only

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; LearnOpenGL section-1.4 textures example with dawn-node smoke gate
